project.name: FleetSense
rules: All design implementations must originate from Figma via MCP get_design_context.
No external icon libraries. Use SVGs exported from Figma, stored in src/components/icons/.
No hex values or default Tailwind palette — only @theme tokens.
No arbitrary values like p-[17px] — use @theme spacing/radius tokens.
Table cell dimensions must match Figma exactly.
